theme_and_archetype.context: Clinical Laboratory Admin Dashboard. Authoritative, precise, reliable, focused on dense data scannability.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense, Data Correlation). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Strict adherence to p-4 or p-6 for containers. Tight padding (p-2) for dense table cells.
layout_and_spacing.page_structure: Left sidebar navigation + Top Sticky Header + Main Content Area
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-aligned for all tabular data and forms. Only center login/hero content.

surface_strategies.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), NO shadow. Clean clinical look.
surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, 1px bottom border.
surface_strategies.modals_dialogs: Solid white background, dark overlay bg-slate-900/40, sharp borders.

components.data_entry_form: Stacked layout. Shadcn inputs. Dynamic multi-result rows should have subtle gray background (bg-slate-50) to group them visually. Use icon buttons for Add/Remove.
components.data_tables: Shadcn Table. Use 'border-collapse'. sticky header with bg-white. Zebra striping (even:bg-slate-50) for scannability. Use tabular-nums class for all numeric columns.
components.buttons: Tactile. Sharp 4px rounded corners (rounded-md), solid colors. No gradients.
components.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react). Weight: 'regular' or 'bold' for active states.

motion.transitions: Minimalist. transition-colors duration-150 ease-in-out for buttons/links. No page-level animations.
motion.feedback: Use toast notifications (Sonner) for all success/error states (e.g., 'Saved to Drive', 'Bulk result applied').

login_hero_bg.description: Focused view of a microscope in a modern laboratory setting
login_hero_bg.usage: Background for the Google Sign-in landing page, overlaid with bg-white/80 or bg-slate-900/60 depending on the split design.

dashboard_placeholder.usage: Optional placeholder image for empty states in reports.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
testing_attributes.convention: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., data-testid='login-google-button', data-testid='submit-lab-result-button', data-testid='add-dynamic-result-row'

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use HTML-based components for advanced user interactions. Use Shadcn UI primitives.
Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for clinical, authoritative iconography (e.g., Microscope, TestTube, FileCsv, CloudArrowUp).

For the dynamic multi-result rows, manage state using React Hook Form's useFieldArray if applicable, or custom state mapping. Ensure each row has a 'Name' (Test Name/Parameter) and 'Result' (Text/Number).
Implement bulk result entry using a Shadcn Table with row selection (checkboxes). Select rows -> Open a top bar/modal to 'Apply Result' -> Updates all selected.
For the Google Drive backup, integrate the Google Drive Picker/API or simulate it with a clear loading state and toast success message, exporting a CSV/Excel blob.
Color scheme MUST stick to the defined slate and blue. Banned colors: purple, teal (#1B93A4), neon green.
